brief: [C] Author a NOVEL, deterministically-scored constructive optimization problem: allocate public-defender case support resources under budget, conflict, coverage, and diversity constraints. Objective=maximize deterministic support utility with strict output validation.

why_it_generalizes: Mass-constrained manifest design with compatibility conflicts, subsystem coverage, and redundancy/tool diversity is a high-signal constructive optimization task.
seed_example: Select spare tools, adapters, and diagnostic kits for a space habitat under mass and volume budgets; interface incompatibilities and safety storage conflicts restrict combinations while subsystems, repair tasks, and tool classes define coverage and diversity.
brief: [C] Author a NOVEL, deterministically-scored constructive optimization problem: choose a space habitat spare-tool manifest under budget, conflict, coverage, and diversity constraints. Maximize deterministic repair-readiness utility with exact validation.

brief: [C] Author a NOVEL, deterministically-scored constructive optimization problem: select a geothermal exploration borehole portfolio under budget, conflict, coverage, and diversity constraints. Objective=maximize deterministic information value with feasibility rejection.
